title: A Garibaldian in the Convent
writer: Renato Angiolillo, Adolfo Franci, Margherita Maglione
actors: Leonardo Cortese, María Mercader, Carla Del Poggio
plot: An old woman's poignant reminiscence of her youth in a convent school: the happy moments, the sad ones and the tragic love for a Garibaldian.
